title: Malware Execution: epxlorer.exe Masquerading as explorer.exe
finding: Typo-squatted process epxlorer.exe (single-char substitution of explorer.exe) spawned by explorer.exe PID 5116. MITRE T1036.005.

title: Command and Control via Fraudulent Telegram Bot API
finding: Outbound C2 from epxlorer.exe (PID 9920) to 104.21.1.247:443, masquerading as a Telegram Bot API endpoint. MITRE T1102.002 / T1573.

title: Phishing Delivery Vector: Browser Download of Malicious Executable
finding: Chromium .crdownload marker proves browser-origin delivery; phishing sender ktso.sec@mailforce.net. MITRE T1566.001 / T1204.002.

title: Critical Asset Compromised: Air Traffic Control Workstation
raw_output: ATC_RADAR.exe active alongside epxlorer.exe on host 172.17.4.12
finding: Aviation operations software ATC_RADAR.exe running on the same compromised workstation (172.17.4.12) as the malware.
